title: Rehoned Tools
description: This is a Minecraft resourcepack that improves the textures of vanilla tools, adding more distinctive details.
body:
___
<div align="center"> 

![Rehoned Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ig0QiCDg/images/373840601cb82352e6e3e4b25babf9e7a571b5f0_350.webp)
___
> **⛏ Rehoned Tools is a Minecraft resource pack that updates the appearance of the main tools, such as swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels, and hoes, in the familiar vanilla style.**

> ⛏ The updated textures enhance the vanilla tools, making each one more distinctive and detailed. This pack is perfect for those who want to see real differences in tools, not just different colors, while preserving the original atmosphere of Minecraft.

   *⚠ The resource pack works properly on all versions 1.13+, despite the warning.*


*Also available on:*  
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00757bc7d10a57d0df6cef75609710e47a86e3e2.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/rehoned-tools)
